32	def sha256_file(path: Path) -> str:
33	    h = hashlib.sha256()
34	    with path.open("rb") as f:
35	        for chunk in iter(lambda: f.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
36	            h.update(chunk)
37	    return h.hexdigest()

41	    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
42	    try:

44	    except json.JSONDecodeError as json_error:
45	        try:
46	            import yaml  # type: ignore[import-not-found]

87	def resolve_asset_path(case: dict[str, Any], key: str, errors: list[str]) -> Path | None:
88	    direct = case.get(key)
89	    env_key = case.get(f"{key}_env")
90	    if direct:
91	        path = Path(str(direct))
92	    elif env_key:
93	        value = os.environ.get(str(env_key))
94	        if not value:
95	            errors.append(f"{case['id']}: ${env_key} is not set")
96	            return None
97	        path = Path(value)
98	    else:
99	        errors.append(f"{case['id']}: no {key} or {key}_env configured")
100	        return None
101	    if not path.is_absolute():
102	        path = REPO_ROOT / path
103	    if not path.is_file():
104	        errors.append(f"{case['id']}: {key} does not exist: {path}")
105	        return None
106	    return path

109	def case_disk_paths(case: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> list[Path] | None:
110	    disks: list[Path] = []
111	    for index, spec in enumerate(case.get("disks", [])):
112	        path: Path | None = None
113	        if isinstance(spec, str):
114	            path = Path(spec)
115	        elif isinstance(spec, dict):
116	            if spec.get("path"):
117	                path = Path(str(spec["path"]))
118	            elif spec.get("env"):
119	                value = os.environ.get(str(spec["env"]))
120	                if not value:
121	                    errors.append(f"{case['id']}: disk {index} env ${spec['env']} is not set")
122	                    return None
123	                path = Path(value)
124	        if path is None:
125	            errors.append(f"{case['id']}: disk {index} has no path/env")
126	            return None
127	        if not path.is_absolute():
128	            path = REPO_ROOT / path
129	        if not path.is_file():
130	            errors.append(f"{case['id']}: disk {index} does not exist: {path}")
131	            return None
132	        disks.append(path)
133	    return disks

136	def run_probe(
137	    probe: Path,
138	    case: dict[str, Any],
139	    out_dir: Path,
140	    timeout_seconds: float,
141	    errors: list[str],
142	) -> dict[str, Any]:
143	    kickstart = resolve_asset_path(case, "kickstart", errors)
144	    disks = case_disk_paths(case, errors)
145	    if kickstart is None or disks is None:
146	        return {"status": "blocked"}
147	
148	    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
149	    cmd = [
150	        str(probe),
151	        "--kickstart",
152	        str(kickstart),
153	        "--out-dir",
154	        str(out_dir),
155	        "--system",
156	        str(case.get("system", "amiga500")),
157	        "--region",
158	        str(case.get("region", "pal")),
159	    ]
160	    if case.get("cycles"):
161	        cmd.extend(["--cycles", str(case["cycles"])])
162	    elif case.get("frames"):
163	        cmd.extend(["--frames", str(case["frames"])])
164	    else:
165	        errors.append(f"{case['id']}: no cycles or frames configured")
166	        return {"status": "blocked"}
167	    if case.get("fast_ram_size"):
168	        cmd.extend(["--fast-ram", str(case["fast_ram_size"])])
169	    for disk in disks:
170	        cmd.extend(["--disk", str(disk)])
171	
172	    started = time.perf_counter()
173	    try:
174	        proc = subprocess.run(
175	            cmd,
176	            cwd=REPO_ROOT,
177	            text=True,
178	            capture_output=True,
179	            timeout=timeout_seconds,
180	            check=False,
181	        )
182	    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired as exc:
183	        return {
184	            "status": "timeout",
185	            "elapsed_seconds": time.perf_counter() - started,
186	            "stdout": exc.stdout[-4000:] if isinstance(exc.stdout, str) else "",
187	            "stderr": exc.stderr[-4000:] if isinstance(exc.stderr, str) else "",
188	        }
189	
190	    hashes: dict[str, str | None] = {}
191	    missing: list[str] = []
192	    for key, name in ARTIFACT_NAMES.items():
193	        path = out_dir / name
194	        if path.is_file():
195	            hashes[key] = sha256_file(path)
196	        else:
197	            hashes[key] = None
198	            missing.append(name)
199	
200	    metadata: dict[str, Any] = {}
201	    metadata_path = out_dir / ARTIFACT_NAMES["metadata"]
202	    if metadata_path.is_file():
203	        try:
204	            metadata = json.loads(metadata_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
205	        except json.JSONDecodeError:
206	            metadata = {"parse_error": True}
207	
208	    return {
209	        "status": "ok" if proc.returncode == 0 and not missing else "failed",
210	        "returncode": proc.returncode,
211	        "elapsed_seconds": time.perf_counter() - started,
212	        "stdout_tail": proc.stdout[-4000:],
213	        "stderr_tail": proc.stderr[-4000:],
214	        "missing_artifacts": missing,
215	        "hashes": hashes,
216	        "metadata": metadata,
217	        "artifact_dir": str(out_dir.relative_to(REPO_ROOT)),
218	    }

221	def expected_hashes(case: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, str | None]:
222	    golden = case.get("golden", {})
223	    if not isinstance(golden, dict):
224	        return {"trace": None, "framebuffer": None, "audio": None}
225	    return {
226	        "trace": golden.get("trace_sha256"),
227	        "framebuffer": golden.get("framebuffer_sha256"),
228	        "audio": golden.get("audio_sha256"),
229	    }

232	def score_case(case: dict[str, Any], run: dict[str, Any], deterministic: bool) -> dict[str, Any]:
233	    expected = expected_hashes(case)
234	    available = all(expected[name] for name in ("trace", "framebuffer", "audio"))
235	    hashes = run.get("hashes", {})
236	    artifact_pass = {
237	        name: bool(expected[name]) and hashes.get(name) == expected[name]
238	        for name in ("trace", "framebuffer", "audio")
239	    }
240	    compatibility_pass = run.get("status") == "ok" and deterministic
241	    frame_audio = (float(artifact_pass["framebuffer"]) + float(artifact_pass["audio"])) / 2.0
242	    acs = 100.0 * (
243	        0.55 * float(artifact_pass["trace"])
244	        + 0.35 * frame_audio
245	        + 0.10 * float(compatibility_pass)
246	    )
247	    if not available:
248	        return {
249	            "scored": False,
250	            "acs": None,
251	            "trace_pass": None,
252	            "framebuffer_pass": None,
253	            "audio_pass": None,
254	            "compatibility_pass": compatibility_pass,
255	            "missing_golden_hashes": [
256	                f"{name}_sha256" for name, value in expected.items() if not value
257	            ],
258	        }
259	    return {
260	        "scored": True,
261	        "acs": acs,
262	        "trace_pass": artifact_pass["trace"],
263	        "framebuffer_pass": artifact_pass["framebuffer"],
264	        "audio_pass": artifact_pass["audio"],
265	        "compatibility_pass": compatibility_pass,
266	    }

269	def ptr_for_case(case: dict[str, Any], run: dict[str, Any], manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> float | None:
270	    metadata = run.get("metadata", {})
271	    elapsed = metadata.get("elapsed_seconds") or run.get("elapsed_seconds")
272	    if not isinstance(elapsed, (int, float)) or elapsed <= 0:
273	        return None
274	    master_hz = float(case.get("master_hz", manifest.get("default_master_hz", 7093790.0)))
275	    if case.get("cycles"):
276	        emulated_seconds = float(case["cycles"]) / master_hz
277	    elif case.get("frames"):
278	        fps_x1000 = metadata.get("video_fps_x1000")
279	        fps = float(fps_x1000) / 1000.0 if isinstance(fps_x1000, (int, float)) else 50.0
280	        emulated_seconds = float(case["frames"]) / fps
281	    else:
282	        return None
283	    return emulated_seconds / float(elapsed)

1	# Arbor Task — Mnemos Amiga Emulation Superiority vs. WinUAE 6.0.3
2	
3	**Agent entry point:** `$arbor-research-agent` (Codex) / `/arbor-research-agent` (Claude Code)
4	**Companion files:** `research_config.yaml`, `mnemos_amiga.plugin.yaml`
5	**Competitive baseline:** WinUAE 6.0.3 (released 2026-03-04). Reference point: WinUAE's
6	custom-chipset rewrite (6.0.0) made Agnus/Alice and Denise/Lisa internally cycle-accurate,
7	moved Denise/Lisa to a separate thread for accurate-mode throughput, and the project
8	characterizes cycle-exact A500 as "100% accurate." That is the bar.
9	
10	---
11	
12	## 0. Read this first — why this is a measurement task before it is an optimization task
13	
14	Arbor hill-climbs a scalar dev metric and merges only changes that clear a margin on a
15	**held-out** split. Two failure modes must be designed out up front, or the run produces
16	confident garbage:
17	
18	1. **Oracle capture.** If the correctness oracle is WinUAE, the best Mnemos can do is
19	   *match* WinUAE, bugs included — superiority becomes impossible by construction. The
20	   oracle must be **hardware truth**, with WinUAE used only as a regression scaffold.
21	2. **Metric gaming.** A single accuracy scalar lets Arbor trade away performance, or
22	   regress N titles to fix M, for a net-positive number. The objective must be
23	   **lexicographic + regression-vetoed**, not a naive weighted sum.
24	
25	Everything below exists to close those two holes. Do not relax them for convenience.
26	
27	---
28	
29	## 1. Arbor Research Contract (intake)
30	
31	| Field | Value |
32	|---|---|
33	| **Objective** | Make Mnemos' Amiga subsystem measurably superior to WinUAE 6.0.3 in **accuracy**, **performance**, and **feature parity+**, proven on a held-out conformance corpus. |
34	| **Target (optimize)** | Mnemos Amiga subsystem source tree — *path to confirm* (§7). |
35	| **Primary metric** | **ACS** — Accuracy Conformance Score, 0–100, continuous, on the dev split. |
36	| **Constraint metric** | **PTR** — Performance Throughput Ratio (× realtime) at the active accuracy tier, on a pinned host. Lexicographically subordinate to ACS, floored. |
37	| **Gates** | Feature/Parity matrix vs WinUAE 6.0.3 — binary milestones that unlock corpus tiers. |
38	| **Baseline** | Current Mnemos ACS/PTR at tier A500-OCS-CE (measure in cycle 0). |
39	| **Held-out discipline** | Conformance corpus split dev/test; merge to trunk only on test-split gain ≥ `merge_threshold` **and** zero regression on previously-passing tests. |
40	| **Protected (read-only)** | Eval harness, golden references, WinUAE baseline traces. Executors may never edit these. |
41	| **Budget / run mode** | See `research_config.yaml`; recommended `interaction_mode: collaborative` (you approve direction + each merge). |
42	| **Out of scope** | Non-Amiga Mnemos cores; UI chrome; anything not on the conformance path. |
43	
44	---
45	
46	## 2. The metric, precisely
47	
48	### 2.1 ACS — primary gradient signal (0–100, dev split)
49	
50	ACS is the weighted aggregate of per-test conformance, chosen so partial correctness
51	yields partial credit (smooth gradient for the hypothesis tree to climb):
52	
53	- **Trace conformance (weight 0.55).** Each micro-test runs to a fixed cycle count and
54	  emits a cycle-stamped event trace: register writes, DMA slot allocation, interrupt
55	  assertion cycles, beam (H/V) position at sampled cycles, audio period/volume reloads.
56	  Score = fraction of cycle-stamped events matching the golden trace. Tolerance band per
57	  signal class; for the cycle-exact tier the band is **zero** (exact cycle or it fails).
58	- **Frame/audio conformance (weight 0.35).** Reference scenes render to a fixed cycle
59	  count; framebuffer and audio sample stream are compared to golden via (a) exact hash —
60	  binary, and (b) a structural distance (per-pixel / per-sample L∞ + count of differing
61	  units) — continuous, providing gradient before exactness is reached.
62	- **Compatibility corpus (weight 0.10).** Curated ADF/WHDLoad/demo set; each title must
63	  reach a known checkpoint (title-screen or in-game frame hash at a fixed cycle). Pass
64	  rate. Low weight because it is a coarse, downstream signal — the first two drive the work.
65	
66	### 2.2 PTR — constraint, not gradient
67	
68	PTR = sustained emulated speed (× realtime, 50/60 Hz reference) at the active accuracy
69	tier, headless, fixed workload, on the **pinned** host (§7) with fixed CPU governor/clocks.
70	GPU is largely irrelevant to chipset-core throughput; it matters only on the RTG/display
71	path — measure those separately.
72	
73	- **Hard floor:** `PTR ≥ PTR_floor` (default 1.0× at the active tier). A change that drops
74	  below the floor is rejected regardless of ACS gain.
75	- **Above floor:** bounded bonus `λ·clamp(PTR − PTR_winuae_parity, 0, cap)` folded into the
76	  dev objective, so speed beyond WinUAE parity is rewarded but cannot buy accuracy.
77	
78	### 2.3 Composite dev objective Arbor optimizes
79	
80	```
81	S_dev = ACS_dev + λ · clamp(PTR_dev − PTR_parity, 0, cap)
82	        with hard reject if PTR_dev < PTR_floor
83	        with hard veto  if any previously-passing conformance test regresses
84	```
85	
86	**Merge rule (held-out):** promote to trunk only if `S_test` gain ≥ `merge_threshold`
87	**and** the regression veto is clean on the test split. The regression veto is independent
88	of the scalar and is non-negotiable: an emulator change that fixes some titles by breaking
89	others is not progress.
90	
91	---
92	
93	## 3. Golden-reference policy — the crux of "superior to WinUAE"
94	
95	- **Tier-A oracle = hardware truth.** Published hardware-truth test-program results and/or
96	  real-hardware captures define correctness: CIA timer/TOD tests, Paula audio period &
97	  sub-period reload tests, Copper/Blitter timing tests, bitplane/sprite DMA-slot tests,
98	  beam-racing references, keyboard-MCU (low-level) tests, AGA fetch-mode tests. Superiority
99	  is *defined* as matching Tier-A where WinUAE diverges.
100	- **Tier-B baseline = WinUAE 6.0.3 cycle-exact traces.** Used **only** as a regression
101	  scaffold and coverage map — never as the correctness oracle. Every Mnemos↔WinUAE
102	  divergence is adjudicated against Tier-A. Where Tier-A confirms Mnemos correct and WinUAE
103	  wrong, that is a **logged superiority win**, not a bug to "fix" toward WinUAE.
104	- All golden + baseline data lives in the protected read-only dir. Generation of WinUAE
105	  baseline traces is an offline, one-time step done *outside* the optimized tree.
106	
107	> **Legal invariant:** Kickstart ROMs, IPF/CAPS images, and commercial title images are not
108	> redistributable and are not part of the repo. The harness references them by path from a
109	> local, user-provided store. Mnemos itself stays Apache-2.0/MIT-clean.
110	
111	---
112	
113	## 4. Hypothesis-tree directions (depth-1 seeds)
114	
115	Each maps to a subsystem with an independently runnable conformance sub-suite, so Executor
116	experiments in isolated worktrees stay clean and attributable.
117	
118	1. **Agnus/Alice** — DMA engine, beam counters, Copper, Blitter, bitplane/sprite DMA slot
119	   allocation, programmed **and** hardwired display sync (the area WinUAE just rewrote).
120	2. **Denise/Lisa** — pixel pipeline, playfield priority, dual-playfield, HAM/EHB, sprites,
121	   AGA fetch modes, blanking/scandouble. Threaded design is a perf lever here.
122	3. **Paula** — audio DMA, period/volume, sub-DMA-period reload timing, interrupts, disk DMA,
123	   floppy MFM/flux decode, serial.
124	4. **CPU cores** — 68000/010 prefetch + cycle-exact; 68020–060 + caches/pipeline; FPU
125	   (softfloat + arithmetic exceptions); MMU; bus-cycle coupling to chipset timing.
126	5. **CIA / timing / glue** — CIA-A/B timers, TOD, low-level keyboard MCU + NKRO, interrupt
127	   prioritization, clock-domain crossing.
128	6. **Disk / storage** — ADF + extended-ADF, IPF/CAPS, SCP/flux, hardfile/RDB/GPT, CD32/CDTV.
129	7. **RTG / display path** — Picasso96/uaegfx, hardware RTG boards, output correctness/scaling.
130	8. **Performance architecture** — scheduler, threading model, dynarec/JIT, dirty-region
131	   rendering, cache-friendly layout. **Must not violate accuracy invariants** — perf wins
132	   are valid only if ACS and the regression veto hold.
133	9. **Compatibility breadth** — corpus pass-rate driver layered on 1–8.
134	
135	Recommended depth-1 ordering follows the accuracy-tier phasing in §5.
136	
137	---
138	
139	## 5. Accuracy-tier phasing (corpus gates)
140	
141	Pursue tiers in order; each gate unlocks the next tier's tests into dev/test:
142	
143	1. **A500 / OCS / cycle-exact** — match WinUAE's stated "100% accurate" bar first. This is
144	   the densest, best-documented conformance target and the right place to prove the method.
145	2. **A500+/A600 / ECS** — ECS Agnus/Denise deltas, productivity/overscan modes.
146	3. **A1200 / AGA / cycle-exact chipset** — beat WinUAE's "good" (non-cycle-exact CPU-internal)
147	   tier by delivering tighter CPU-internal timing, a concrete superiority axis.
148	4. **A3000/A4000 + accelerators / RTG** — where WinUAE is "fast-CPU-only"; cycle-accurate
149	   chipset access + competitive throughput here is a clear differentiation lane.
150	
151	---
152	
153	## 6. Success criteria (definition of done)
154	
155	- **Accuracy:** ACS_test at tier A500-OCS-CE ≥ Tier-A truth within the cycle-exact (zero)
156	  tolerance band on the full held-out suite; ≥ K logged superiority wins where Mnemos
157	  matches hardware and WinUAE 6.0.3 does not.
158	- **Performance:** PTR at each active tier ≥ WinUAE 6.0.3 on the pinned host, with the
159	  accuracy invariant intact (no accuracy traded for speed).
160	- **Features:** Parity matrix ≥ WinUAE 6.0.3 on the agreed scope, each feature backed by
161	  passing conformance tests (no feature counts until its tests pass).
162	- **Hygiene:** zero-warning build, deterministic harness, every merge regression-clean,
163	  every superiority win documented with the adjudicating Tier-A reference.
164	
165	---
166	
167	## 7. Open decisions — confirm before launch (do not assume)
168	
169	Arbor's intake will ask for these if unset; resolving them now prevents a wrong-target run.
170	
171	1. **Target path.** Exact Mnemos repo + Amiga subsystem directory to optimize.
172	2. **Harness precondition (blocking).** Arbor requires a *runnable eval script + dev/test
173	   data + clean git*. Confirm Mnemos exposes a **headless, deterministic, scriptable** run
174	   mode with: fixed cycle-count run, trace export, framebuffer+audio dump, and hashing. If
175	   not, **build that harness first** — it is prerequisite work, not part of the optimized
176	   loop, and the optimization cannot start without it.
177	3. **Golden corpus.** Which Tier-A hardware-truth references / test programs you have legal
178	   access to; confirmation that WinUAE 6.0.3 Tier-B traces will be generated locally.
179	4. **Pinned perf host.** CPU model + fixed governor/clock policy for PTR determinism. (GPU
180	   RTX 5090 is known; the chipset-core throughput number is CPU/memory-bound — pin the CPU.)
181	5. **Tier scope/order.** Confirm §5 phasing and the first tier to target.
182	6. **Budget.** `max_cycles`, `max_depth`, `executor.max_turns`, wall-clock ceiling, staged
183	   smoke→pilot→full profile (see plugin).
184	7. **Run mode.** Confirm `collaborative` (recommended) vs `review`/`direction`/`auto`.
185	
186	---
187	
188	## 8. Risks / failure modes to monitor
189	
190	- **Determinism leaks** (host timing, threading races, uninitialized state) make ACS noisy
191	  and break dev/test discipline → enforce a deterministic, single-source-of-time harness;
192	  seed and pin everything; CI a repeat-run hash check.
193	- **Threaded Denise/Lisa-style perf work** introducing ordering races that pass intermittently
194	  → conformance must run under deterministic scheduling; perf threading validated against the
195	  same golden traces, not a relaxed mode.
196	- **Tier-B drift** — silently treating WinUAE as the oracle → adjudication against Tier-A is
197	  mandatory on every divergence; log, don't auto-converge.
198	- **Corpus overfit** — climbing dev compat % by special-casing titles → low corpus weight,
199	  held-out test split, and the regression veto are the guards; watch for narrow hacks in
200	  Executor diffs.
